julesThoughtProcess: I picked a cool, deep sky blue (#00bfff) to convey a sense of calm resilience in the face of dense, bustling city environments. The character's intense but weary gaze, combined with the structural background, suggests someone who navigates a lot of high-tech machinery daily but remains grounded in quiet contemplation.
storyPanel: Elias tapped the screen of the automated transit diagnostic, adjusting his spectacles as another burst of exhaust vented from the overhead tracks. It was a loud, greasy job keeping the mag-lev freight lines running in the lower districts, but there was a rhythm to it. The heavy machinery sang a low hum of power, and between the clanking gears and the neon glow of the maintenance depot, he found a quiet sense of purpose.
